subcodes.first_line: Blessed is he who proclaims the doctrine of Spiritual Brotherhood, for he shall be the Child of Light
subcodes.subjects: @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick, @service to others; to the Cause of God
